description_long: This is a handheld digital multimeter, commonly used for measuring electrical values such as voltage, current, and resistance. The device features a large digital LCD display at the top, with a rotary dial in the center for selecting measurement modes. Two test probes, one black and one red, are attached to the front and can be stored in clips on the body. The casing is primarily red with black accents, and the back has a black panel, likely for battery access. The front panel is marked with various measurement symbols and units, and several physical buttons are present below the display. The overall design is ergonomic, with a slightly curved body for comfortable handheld use.
description: A red and black handheld digital multimeter with a large LCD display, rotary dial, and attached test probes. It features ergonomic design and clear measurement markings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the LCD display, rotary dial, measurement markings, and both test probes clipped to the body.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the device and the profile of the attached probes.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the smooth red casing and a black panel, likely for battery access.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the side profile and the arrangement of the probes.
